Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0810 "4MARENA-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "4M Arena (Darro99 & Erazzking - 2021).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added LDA #$24 and STA $47 instructions before the JMP $9FD9 instruction at $0852 to ensure the title music plays at the correct speed.
